name: glove-python
description: A Python REPL for LLM tool use — expose an agent's capabilities as functions in a tiny, sandboxed Python interpreter it drives with one execute_python tool. Tools become functions called with kwargs, results are plain data, module-level names persist across calls, big values stay out of context via elision, and a fuel budget bounds runaway work. Consumes the same ToolFn catalog as glove-js and glove-lisp's function mode.
